mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO patra_ingest.ing_outbox_relay_log ( message_id, relay_batch_id, channel, partition_key, lease_owner, attempt_number, relay_status, error_code, error_message, error_kind, started_at, completed_at, duration_ms, next_retry_at, version, created_at, updated_at, deleted ) VALUES
( #{log.messageId}, #{log.relayBatchId}, #{log.channel}, #{log.partitionKey}, #{log.leaseOwner}, #{log.attemptNumber}, #{log.relayStatus}, #{log.errorCode}, #{log.errorMessage}, #{log.errorKind}, #{log.startedAt}, #{log.completedAt}, #{log.durationMs}, #{log.nextRetryAt}, 0, NOW(6), NOW(6), 0 )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM patra_ingest.ing_outbox_relay_log WHERE message_id = #{messageId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY started_at DESC
SELECT * FROM patra_ingest.ing_outbox_relay_log WHERE relay_batch_id = #{batchId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY started_at ASC
